note: Published aggregate market statistics only; no individual listing or sold records. Each block carries its own source and definition. Monthly cadence; series accrue as new reports publish.

trercContext.source: Texas Real Estate Research Center, Texas Housing Insight (published 2026-07-01; April 2026 data)
